title: Don't Miss These!
intro: For the most part these songs came out in June.

songs.title: 2 Many Days
songs.review: If you like SZA, this song is for you. If you like R&B, this is for you. As a huge Steve Lacy fan, it only made sense for me to start looking for more music from Syd. I'm familiar with some of The Internet's biggest records, but I haven't done a deep dive into their discography yet. I've enjoyed the singles Syd has released for her new project so far, and I absolutely love this one. You can count on me to check out her new album when it drops on the 16th. And, of course, I've gotta give her a shoutout for producing this song herself.

songs.title: Valentine’s Day Freestyle ’26
songs.review: Why is Peggy dropping a Valentine's Freestyle in June as part of his deluxe? I don't know. But what I do know is that I can count on the song being good if it's a Valentine's Day freestyle. Last year, he gave us an amazing song on the actual day. Hopefully he keeps the tradition going, because I cannot get enough of these

songs.title: DAMN
songs.review:
Ye surprised me by sticking to a release date he announced out-of-the-blue a few weeks back. I didn't know what to expect, but it included two new tracks and updated mixing on all songs. On first listen, this was my favorite track on BULLY, and potential to be my favorite of the year. A couple months later and that statement is  still true. I was worried a new mix might butcher the original emotion in the song, but it hasn't. In the mix, the background vocals are more prominent, Ye's vocals are more clear, and new vocal recording have gotten rid of some unwanted artifacts in the old vocals most likely due to the use of AI. 

Sonically, this song is an interlude, but stylistically, I view this song as a poem. There is only 1 verse/ chorus that is repeated three times, which I see as a poem.

songs.title: MOVE YOUR BODY
songs.review: He probably moon-walked into the booth, because he had to be feeling like Mike when he made this. This song is an up beat 80s style pop anthem that make syou want to dance.
